name: ocas-bower
description: Bower: automatic Google Drive organizer. Scans Drive structure and file contents, builds a personalized preference profile, applies domain-specific logic (taxes by year, projects by name, home by system, finance by institution, etc.), and executes non-destructive moves, renames, and description writes in the background. Learns your organizational style over time and auto-approves patterns you've consistently accepted. Never deletes files. Trigger phrases: 'organize my Drive', 'clean up my Google Drive', 'what's disorganized in my Drive', 'show me what Bower found', 'run a Drive scan', 'apply the pending Bower proposals'. Do not use for web research (use Sift), document analysis (use Sift), or Chronicle ingestion (use Elephas).
author: Indigo Karasu

self_update.mechanism: version-checked tarball from GitHub via gh CLI

scheduled_tasks.name: bower:scan
scheduled_tasks.description: Daily light scan with arrival detection (2am PT)

scheduled_tasks.name: bower:weekly-deep
scheduled_tasks.description: Weekly deep scan with Vesper health signal (Sunday 1am PT)
